title: The Forgotten Arts
description: A mod that adds art styles with abilities, that can be unlocked for mid/late game. Preferably to be used on multiplayer servers
body:
A mod (also my first mod) that adds different combat art-styles by crafting **emblems**. Each has different combat oriented abilities, and mastery of the art, which can be attained by **killing bosses** (subject to change). Most suitable to be used in **Multiplayer servers**, because of the **wide PvP-utility**, adding a new layer of depth in PVP.

Current objective list:
- Maintain the mod with QOL changes and bugfixes
- Add a new structure, giving an **Ancient Emblem**, instead of evokers.

For any feedback suggestions, or bugs, you can contact me on discord. User: _the7thaz_
